use_cases: Displaying team contributor information including names, emails, and locations
Managing and tracking contributor payment status and payout amounts
Providing an at-a-glance view of contributor activity status across a platform
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist data table component for displaying contributor information including names, emails, locations, activity status, and payout amounts. Features hover interactions on rows and status-based styling with colored badges for easy data scanning. Built using a reusable table component system with proper semantic HTML structure for accessibility.
